parameters.query: SELECT layer_id, model_used, SUM(cost_cents) AS total_cents, COUNT(*) AS total_runs FROM cost_log WHERE recorded_at >= CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY layer_id, model_used ORDER BY total_cents DESC;

INSERT INTO cost_summary (run_date, total_cost_cents, by_layer, budget_percent, status, created_at) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE, {{ $json.total_cost_cents }}, '{{ $json.by_layer | tojson | replace("'", "''") }}'::jsonb, {{ $json.budget_percent }}, '{{ $json.status }}', NOW());
